login.title: One door. One login.
login.subtitle: No passwords. New here? Signing in creates your account. Members post deals and see the board.
login.linkExpired: That code expired or was already used. Enter your email below and we will send a fresh one.
login.notConfigured: Sign-in becomes available once Supabase Auth is connected. Add your Supabase keys to enable email and Google login.
login.googleDisabled: Google sign-in disabled (no client ID configured).

code.heading: Enter your code
code.sentTo: We sent a six digit code to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.
code.label: Digit
code.wrong: That code is not right. Check the email and try again.
code.expired: That code expired. Send yourself a new one.
code.switched: You were signed in as someone else. That session has been replaced.
